rulings.Case Title: SOFIA NEW ET AL VS. MANUEL LANGIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On The Second Amended Cross-Complaint Of Manuel And Aurora Langit, Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 9, 2016, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MID VALLEY SERVICES INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On The Second Amended Cross-Complaint Of Manuel And Aurora Langit, Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication GRANTED. 2008 Deed of Trust is not a valid lien. Alliance Mortgage v. Rothwell (1995) 10 Cal.4th 1226; Western Loan v. Scheib (1933) 218 Cal.386, 393; CC 2891; Bell v. Bank of America (1908) 153 Cal.234. Dool v. First Nation Bank (1930) 107 Cal.App.585 is inapposite. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUAN YANG WU VS. TIM WONG
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday , June 9, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANTS TIM WONG and LINDA WONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The complaint is sufficiently alleged. Defendants failed to show that the entire complaint is barred (a) by the statute of limitations under CCP 340(a) or (b) by res judicata. = (501/REQ)
